prestazioni: VQ40DE (4.0L V6) engine swap to a fully built VQ40DE with forged internals (JE 9.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on E85 via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom speed density tuning for desert heat compensation

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: South Race Works billet aluminum differential cover, ARP 12-point axle studs, and a Nismo 4.63:1 ring & pinion set with a Cusco 2-way LSD for improved sand traction under boost

Suspension overhaul with King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (16" travel front, 18" travel rear) paired with Total Chaos Fabrication upper A-arms and Icon Vehicle Dynamics 3.5" extended travel leaf springs with poly bushings for high-speed desert stability
estetica: Custom Rally Armor URBAN Xtreme front and rear fender flares (extended 3" for 37" Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires) with a matching custom Desert Runner-specific livery by Vinyl Frog (matte black base, neon orange accents, and reflective 3M Scotchlite striping for night visibility)

Prinsu Designs modular roof rack with a Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bar (50" curved) and a RotopaX 4-gallon water/fuel dual mount system, paired with a custom aluminum skid plate (3/8" thick) by Pelfreybilt for underbody protection

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full Sparco Pro 2000 race seat (6-point harness) setup, a custom aluminum dash panel by Desert Armor with a Racepak IQ3 digital dash, and a custom roll cage by 4 Wheel Parts (DOM 1.75" x .120" chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system
